name: baishou-next
description: 白守 Next — 以纯白誓约，守护彼此一生。

scripts.dev:mobile: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "启动 Metro 开发服务器；请确保手机已安装开发版 APK 且与电脑同一 Wi‑Fi。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile dev
scripts.dev:mobile:clear: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "清 Metro 缓存后启动（连不上 bundler、换依赖后白屏时用）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile dev:clear
scripts.mobile:android: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "编译并安装 Android 开发版到真机/模拟器；仅改 JS 时不必重跑，用 pnpm dev:mobile。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile android
scripts.mobile:android:clean: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "升级 Expo 或原生模块后使用：清原生构建缓存，重新编译并安装 APK。请先在手机上卸载旧版 com.anonymous.mobile（避免闪退）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile android:clean
scripts.mobile:cache: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "仅清除 Metro / .expo 缓存，不重新编译原生。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile cache
scripts.mobile:fix: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "将 Expo 相关依赖对齐到当前 SDK（改 package.json 后建议执行）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile fix
scripts.mobile:export: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "导出 Android 离线包到 apps/mobile/dist。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile export:android
scripts.mobile:connect: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "USB 连接手机：adb reverse 并打开开发版（需另一终端已运行 pnpm dev:mobile）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile connect
scripts.mobile:setup: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "首次克隆或升级 Expo 后：install → fix 依赖 → 清编安装 APK。" pnpm install && pnpm mobile:fix && pnpm mobile:android:clean
